title: Create a new board item when status changes
excerpt: We have a board set up with projects. After we change the status to DONE, we want it to move the entire item to a board called INVOICED. And then have the ability in this board to add our invoice #. We only want it to mo…

posts.author: baileyalexander (Brian)
posts.cookedHtml: We have a board set up with projects. After we change the status to DONE, we want it to move the entire item to a board called INVOICED. And then have the ability in this board to add our invoice #. We only want it to move several key fields to the new board.

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @baileyalexander - this is easily accomplished with automations:

image782×301 17.2 KB

You can use the item dialog to choose which columns are mapped to the new board:

image621×639 23.1 KB

Does this answer your question?

Thanks
Mark

posts.author: baileyalexander (Brian)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, thank you. We were getting stuck with the item mapping.
